name: Arroz Con Pollo (Chicken & Rice)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Skinless, boneless chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch strips
1 cup crushed and drained canned tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute chicken strips in a non-stick skillet until white, about 5 minutes. Set aside and keep warm.
2. In a large skillet, bring all other ingredients, except peas, pimentos, and capers, to a boil.
3. Cover and simmer for about 30 minutes, until rice has absorbed the liquid.
4. Add peas, turn off heat, and let steam.
5. Arrange chicken and sauce over rice, garnish with pimentos and capers.
6. Makes 6 servings.
